title: Synchronization Between Teams and Departments
excerpt: Many Enterprise clients express the need for ongoing permission management on a per-board or workspace basis. Automatic synchronization between departments and user groups is critical. Alternatively, it would be benefici…

posts.author: ItamarS (itamar strum)
posts.cookedHtml: Many Enterprise clients express the need for ongoing permission management on a per-board or workspace basis. Automatic synchronization between departments and user groups is critical. Alternatively, it would be beneficial to allow tagging departments directly, not just user groups.
